description: Google Cloud Trace is a distributed tracing service in Google Cloud for collecting, storing, and viewing traces and spans from applications. It helps developers analyze request latency and trace execution across services.
summary: Cloud Trace exposes a REST API at https://cloudtrace.googleapis.com and an MCP server at https://cloudtrace.googleapis.com/mcp; the MCP endpoint is publicly reachable with no auth, while the REST API authentication could not be confirmed from the retrieved docs.
